name: Telephone and Data Systems Inc. Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/1000th Interest in a 6.625% Series UU Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Telephone and Data Systems, Inc. is a telecommunications company that provides wireless, wireline, and cable services. It operates through its subsidiaries, including U.S. Cellular and TDS Telecom. The company is headquartered in Chicago, Illinois.
